title: Rosemarie_Myrdal
raw_text:
Rosemarie Myrdal (née Lohse; May 20, 1929 – October 11, 2023) was an American North Dakota Republican Party politician who served as the second female, and 35th lieutenant governor of North Dakota from 1993 to 2001 under Governor Ed Schafer in 1992. She also served in the North Dakota House of Representatives from 1985 to 1992. Myrdal was married to Benedict John Myrdal in 1952 and had five children. He died in 2000.
Myrdal died in Grafton, North Dakota, at the age of 94.
